description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its leatherette upper and elegant metal hardware adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. If you're looking for a bag with class and quality, you can expand your collection with this accessory. Height: 26cm Width: 30cm Depth: 10cm Blended fabric upper for durability A flap on the front with a twist button closure One zippered pocket on the front and one at the back One main compartment with a zippered pocket and a mobile pouch Two short handles Buckle design on the front Metallic brand badge appliqued on the front Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
